message:
fix(ingest): fix capture_snapshot returning None on first capture

Fixed a bug where capture_snapshot always returned None due to comparing
current_snapshot with the already-updated last_snapshot value. The fix
saves the previous snapshot before updating it.

Also fixed test calls to include the new external_alt_screen parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
